included.text: Daily breakfast and regional dinner meals
Local experienced driver and sightseeing guide
Private air-conditioned transfers for the entire route

itinerary.title: Arrive in Trivandrum & Kovalam Beach
itinerary.description: Arrive in Trivandrum. Visit the historic Sree Padmanabhaswamy Temple and spend a relaxing evening on the golden sands of Kovalam Beach.

itinerary.title: Kanyakumari Confluence & Vivekananda Rock
itinerary.description: Drive to Kanyakumari, India's southern tip. Take a ferry to the Vivekananda Rock Memorial and watch the sun set over the confluence of three oceans.

itinerary.title: Drive to Ponmudi Misty Hills
itinerary.description: Travel to the quiet, winding hills of Ponmudi. Hike through the misty green trails, enjoy mountain views, and watch the sunset from the hills.

itinerary.title: Thenmala Eco-Tourism & Departure
itinerary.description: Explore Thenmala Eco-Tourism zone. Visit the Thenmala Dam, walk in the deer park, and witness the musical fountain show before your departure.

title: Trivandrum, Kanyakumari & Ponmudi: Southern Hills & Coast
description: Uncover the scenic diversity of India's far south. Visit Trivandrum's heritage sites, watch the sunrise and sunset at Vivekananda Rock in Kanyakumari, climb the winding hairpin bends of Ponmudi hill station, and experience eco-tourism in Thenmala.
highlights: Tour Padmanabhaswamy Temple and Kovalam Beach in Trivandrum
Explore Kanyakumari Rock Memorial and Gandhi Memorial
Trek the misty, winding peaks of Ponmudi Hill Station
See Thenmala Dam, Deer Park, and the musical fountain show
